case_title: MORALES BERNARDINO et al VS MC GRIFF III LEAMOND C

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $40.00 FILED BY MORALES BERNARDINO TOPETE ROSARIO AS TO DEFENDANT MC GRIFF III LEAMOND C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
